description: A new in-scope safety report; canned gateway result finds it material.

config.scope: public agency recall and inspection reports

input.title: Agency orders recall of Model X brake actuators after inspection findings
input.body: The National Transportation Safety Agency has ordered a recall of Model X brake actuators manufactured between 2024 and 2025 after field inspections found premature wear that could reduce braking performance. Operators are directed to schedule inspections within 30 days.

cannedGatewayResult.rationale: A recall order affecting braking performance across a two-year production range is materially relevant to the configured transportation-safety beat.

evidence_spans.quote: ordered a recall of Model X brake actuators manufactured between 2024 and 2025 after field inspections found premature wear that could reduce braking performance
evidence_spans.why_material: Directly describes a safety-critical recall with a defined scope.
